title: wollastonia javana
intro: Wollastonia javana, also known as Java woolly plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asian countries, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Wollastonia javana include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Wollastonia javana can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or by mixing the dried leaves with other herbs to create teas, infusions, or tinctures.
